repo.description: Neotest adapter for unitest test runner of Gleam lang

terms.context_snippet: A [Gleam](https://gleam.run/) adapter for the [Neotest](https://github.com/nvim-neotest/neotest) framework, built for projects using [unitest](https://github.com/maxdeviant/unitest) as the test runner.

A [Gleam](https://gleam.run/) adapter for the [Neotest](https://github.com/nvim-neotest/neotest) framework, built for projects using [unitest](https://github.com/maxdeviant/unitest) as the test runner.
